summary: Sprint 9 build checks all pass. Backend ruff lint reports no errors across all modified files. Frontend tsc --noEmit reports no errors in source files (stale .next/types artifact excluded). Frontend lint reports 15 warnings (pre-existing) and 0 errors. CI green on both Backend CI and Frontend CI workflows. starlette 1.0.0 and pytest-asyncio 1.3.0 upgrades do not affect build artifacts.
